suggested_actions: Verify: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT unique_key) FROM gpm_repeat_buyer_dim

decision_log.decision: Escalate to owner — upstream data fix required
decision_log.rationale: The root cause is upstream duplicate data in participation_fact_enriched. This requires the upstream owner (@tao.yang) to dedup the source table before gpm_repeat_buyer_dim can be rerun successfully.
alternatives_considered: fix_directly — but this is a data issue, not a code issue
